title: Prism Bloom Exercise Event Planning Automation
subtitle: Automation that reads the Prism Bloom Exercise Event Database and posts upcoming events to Discord.
description: PBE Event Planning Automation is a scheduling tool for Prism Bloom Exercise that reads the Prism Bloom Exercise Event Database and generates upcoming event entries.
The automation is designed to prepare events for the upcoming second week, or the week after the next, then automatically post them to the Discord events page.
Future expansion is planned to add calendar posting based on event location, allowing events to be routed to the correct calendar when generated.
features: Reads event records from the Prism Bloom Exercise Event Database
Generates scheduled event entries for the upcoming second week or the week after the next
Automatically posts generated events to the Discord events page
Supports repeatable event scheduling from stored database records
Planned calendar integration that posts events to different calendars depending on location
statusDetails: Current workflow reads from the Prism Bloom Exercise Event Database
Discord event posting is implemented for upcoming generated events
Calendar routing by location is planned as a future feature

howItWorks: The automation reads event and scheduling data from the Prism Bloom Exercise Event Database.
It builds event entries for the upcoming second week or the week after the next, depending on the selected scheduling window.
Generated event entries are automatically posted to the Discord events page.
A planned calendar layer will route generated events to the correct calendar based on event location.
setupInstall: Connect the automation to the Prism Bloom Exercise Event Database.
Configure the scheduling window for the upcoming second week or the week after the next.
Connect the Discord posting workflow to the correct Discord events page.
Add calendar routing rules when location-based calendar posting is implemented.
apiStructure: Database layer: Prism Bloom Exercise Event Database stores event data used by the automation.
Automation layer: Reads records, calculates the target week, and generates event entries.
Discord layer: Posts generated events to the Discord events page.
Planned calendar layer: Routes generated events to a calendar based on location.

progressNotes: Designed the automation workflow for generating Prism Bloom Exercise events from stored database records.
Implemented database reading from the Prism Bloom Exercise Event Database.
Added scheduling logic for generating events for the upcoming second week or the week after the next.
Implemented automatic posting to the Discord events page.
Planned future calendar integration for generated Prism Bloom Exercise events.
Outlined location-based routing so events can post to different calendars depending on where they take place.
Prepared the project documentation to reflect Discord posting as the current output and calendar posting as a future expansion.
